titleStmt.title: SII 37.371A: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 371a. (A.R. No. B 1 of 1941-42.) Mācherla, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District.

summary.p: Broken slab kept in the compound of the taluk office.
Eastern Chāḷukya : Sakala-lōkāśraya Jayasimha Vallabha II 8th Regnal year (709 A.D.)

Slightly damaged. It registers a grant of six puṭṭis of land made by Kalyāṇavasantulu, the son of Dhanyavasantha-Pṛithvī Dēśaraṭṭaguḍi, who was the son of Dayāvasanta-Pṛithvī-Dēśaraṭṭaguḍi, to Arahanta Bhaṭāra. The gift was to be maintained by the family of Raṭṭaguḍis of Koṁthūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1710
Agunēṭi kīlaka nāma saṁ
vatsara phālguṇa śu 15 lu pali
nāṭiśīmalō kusubā mācarla Ane
grāmānaku vuttarabhāgāna vuttaravāhi
ṇi caṁdrabhāgānadītīramaṁdu vuṁḍē
śrī bālātripura suṁdarī samētulaina śrī ciṁ
ttala rāmēśvarasvāmi vāriki harita
gōtrōdbhavuluṁnnu mṛtyuṁjaya dīkṣi
tuluṁnnu kṛṣṇaṁma sōmidēvaṁmma pautṛluṁ
nnu veṁkaṁnna paṁtuluṁnnu tirpataṁmma putṛ
luṁnnu Ayina nāgulapāṭi Appāji paṁ
tulavāru vrāyiṁcci yiccina varṣaśana
dharmaśāsana patrike śrīrāmēśvarasvāmi
vāri dakṣiṇabhāgamaṁdu bālātripurasuṁ
darīdēvi śilāvigrahaṁ pratiṣṭa cēyiṁsti
mi ganuka yī staḷānaku nityanaivēdyadīpārā
dhana modalayina Ayidu pargaṇāla daśamu
kha dēśapāṁḍyālu cēvrālatōhnulu 25
Akṣarālā yiruvai Ayidu varahālu
pargaṇāla grāmādulu sāyaru toḍā
lu Aṁtavaṭuna varṣāśana patrike yī śuddha
paurnavami brahmasāvarṇi manvā
di puṇyakālamaṁddu vrāyiṁcci yistimi
ganuka yī varṣaśanamu . tō kūḍina dravya
saṁvatsaramu vayinaṁ coppuna stōma
svāmivāriki kāvalaśina nityanaivē
rādhana modalayina vutsavamula
sturāvalenu . madvaṁśajāṁ
Digital edition of SII 37.371A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
